diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -43,7 +43,10 @@
         dist = torch.cdist(pos, pos)  # [B, N, N]

         rbf = torch.exp(-0.5 * ((dist.unsqueeze(-1) - self.rbf_centers) / self.rbf_width) ** 2)  # [B, N, N, R]

 

+        # Pairwise atom mask + cutoff mask

         pair_mask = (mask.unsqueeze(1) & mask.unsqueeze(2)).unsqueeze(-1).float()  # [B, N, N, 1]

+        cutoff_mask = (dist < self.cutoff).unsqueeze(-1).float()  # [B, N, N, 1]

+        pair_mask = pair_mask * cutoff_mask

 

         for mlp in self.interactions:

             edge_feat = mlp(rbf)  # [B, N, N, H]

--- a/train.py
